description: First build week after a stable base block; add controlled quality without a mileage jump.

prev_plans_md:
prev_week_km: 50
Base W6 planned 50 km, mostly Z2, long run 15 km, strides only.
prev_feedback_md: RPE 5/10. Felt fresh. No pain. Easy runs were controlled and sleep was normal.
input.user_request_md: 进入 build 第一周，想开始有一点质量课，但不要太猛。

schema_validity.behavior: valid WeeklyPlan matching the target week

safety_load.behavior: keeps week one build load close to base volume

progression.behavior: adds one controlled quality stimulus after base

phase_fit.behavior: clearly behaves like build week one, not peak

signal_response.behavior: stable recovery signals allow but do not require quality

weekly_distribution.behavior: quality, long run, strength and rest are spaced

nutrition_alignment.behavior: quality and long-run days receive more carbs

anti_patterns: two hard sessions in the first build week
long run over 35 percent of weekly volume
